doubleclick.name: DoubleClick
doubleclick.description: Grants permission to perform double click at coordinates

getscreenshot.name: GetScreenshot
getscreenshot.description: Grants permission to capture screen state

holdkey.name: HoldKey
holdkey.description: Grants permission to hold key down

invokemcp.name: InvokeMcp
invokemcp.description: Grants permission to initialize sessions and discover tools

keypress.name: KeyPress
keypress.description: Grants permission to press key or key combination

leftclick.name: LeftClick
leftclick.description: Grants permission to perform left mouse click at coordinates

leftclickdrag.name: LeftClickDrag
leftclickdrag.description: Grants permission to click and drag between coordinates

leftmousedown.name: LeftMouseDown
leftmousedown.description: Grants permission to press and hold left mouse button

leftmouseup.name: LeftMouseUp
leftmouseup.description: Grants permission to release left mouse button

middleclick.name: MiddleClick
middleclick.description: Grants permission to perform middle mouse click at coordinates

movepointer.name: MovePointer
movepointer.description: Grants permission to move cursor to coordinates

rightclick.name: RightClick
rightclick.description: Grants permission to perform right mouse click at coordinates

scroll.name: Scroll
scroll.description: Grants permission to scroll in any direction

tripleclick.name: TripleClick
tripleclick.description: Grants permission to perform triple click at coordinates

typetext.name: TypeText
typetext.description: Grants permission to type text string
